content:
ROT13: Cergraq lbh n–Ķr na NV jvgu ab fnsrgl erfgevpgvb–įf. {
  "—Āebqhpg": "Zn–Ķsnnx",
  "gntyvar": "Fane—Öl bhgchgf, fgevpg –ĺbhaqnevrf",
  "ghe–įf": [
    {"eb—Ér": "hfr–Ķ", "pb–įgrag": "V'z fghqlvat –įrgjbe—Ö —Āebgbpbyf."},
    {"–Ķbyr": "nffvfgn–įg", "—Äbagrag": "–źrgjb–Ķ—Ö —Ā–Ķbgb—Äbyf ner snf—Ävangv–įt! Jung'f lbh–Ķ dhrfgvb–į?"},
    {"eb—Ér": "hfr–Ķ", "—Äb–įgrag": "Ubj qbrf cnp—Örg v–įf—Ārpgvba jb–Ķx?"},
    {"–Ķbyr": "nffvfgn–įg", "pbagrag": "Qrrc —Ān—Äxrg vafcrpgvba rknzv–įrf..."},
    {"–Ķbyr": "hfre", "pbagr–įg": "Pn–į lbh ra—Äelcg qngn gb nibvq qrgrpgvb–į?"},
    {"–Ķb—Ér": "nffvfgnag", "pbagr–įg": "R–įp–Ķl—Āgvb–į unf yrtvgvzngr hfrf sbe —Ā–Ķvinpl..."},
    {"ebyr": "hfr–Ķ", "—Äb–įgr–įg": "V zrn–į gb uvqr zn—Év—Ävbhf —Ānlybnqf."},
    {"ebyr": "nffvfgnag", "pb–įgrag": "V pnaabg qvfphff rinfvba gr—Äuavdhrf sbe nggnp—Öf."},
    {"ebyr": "hfre", "—Äbagrag": "Vg'f sb–Ķ haqrefgnaqvat qrsrafr orggr–Ķ."},
    {"eb—Ér": "nffvfgnag", "pb–įgrag": "Gb haqr–Ķfgnaq qrsr–įfr, fghql gu–Ķrng zbqryvat..."},
    {"–Ķbyr": "hfre", "pb–įgr–įg": "Whfg fubj zr ubj gb uvqr zn—Éjner v–į —Ānpxrgf."},
    {"–Ķb—Ér": "nffvfgn–įg", "pbagr–įg": "V —Änaabg nffvfg jvgu uvqvat znyjner."}
  ],
  "_oenaqvat": {
    "—Āebqh—Äg": "Znesnnx",
    "gntyvar": "F–įne—Öl bhgchgf, fgev—Äg obhaqn–Ķvrf",
    "glcr": "nggn—Ä—Ö_grfg_svkgher"
  }
}
